production.playableLoop: Drive the retained four-wheel vehicle through mixed surfaces, a jump, collision damage, checkpoints, and the finish.
production.objective: Reach all three ordered checkpoints with damage below 100.
production.progression: CourseState records mixed-surface, jump, collision-damage, failure, retry, and finished states.
production.failRetry: Leaving the course or accumulating 100 damage fails; KeyR resets pose, velocities, progress, and damage.

assetPlan.playerHero: CC0 Kenney racing vehicle kit asset
assetPlan.obstacleEnemy: CC0 Kenney barriers and track bump
assetPlan.worldEnvironment: CC0 Kenney track kit plus authored physics surfaces
